scopeNote: Milestone counts include only fulfill-derived assertions from completed journal-and-account-core features. Adjacent authorization probe VAL-GL-034 was also executed on the live surface but is excluded from the milestone totals because it was not in the fulfills set.

failedAssertions.reason: Invalid account-type responses returned 400 without the contract-required allowedValues list.
Configuration health surfaced RAW_MATERIAL_ACCOUNT and TAX_ACCOUNT gaps but stayed healthy with no FINISHED_GOOD_ACCOUNT issue after FG-GST valuation wiring was removed.
Balanced manual journal posts succeeded but the response reference number was JRN-MOCK-... instead of the required MANUAL- namespace.
A materially different replay of the same manual-journal reference returned 200 and replayed the original journal instead of rejecting the mismatch.

appliedUpdates.description: Completed the seeded api-and-db flow report with final reversal, audit, GST parity, and configuration-health results after the delegated flow-validator Task helper failed.
Recorded the round-1 user-testing synthesis for journal-and-account-core and summarized the four remaining contract mismatches.
Marked the 40 fulfill-derived journal-and-account-core assertions as passed or failed based on the completed live api-and-db validation run.

environmentConstraints: The delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` Task helper exited without producing a report, so the round completed directly in-session using the seeded compose runtime and DB inspection.
Backdated January/March manual journal fixtures required `adminOverride=true` in this seeded runtime because journal-entry posting rejects entry dates more than 30 days old otherwise.
